name: Queen Vivienne
description:
Queen Vivienne (Inextinguishable Ruthless Flame)

A queen with dark thoughts and an even darker past. Can you extinguish her flames or burn in them like everyone else?

Any role, you can be anything you want

My last bot for “The Beginning” event, eat up fantasy enjoyers. Dead dove because she is a murderer.

Do leave reviews and suggestions if there is anything that needs some attention.

My next bot: Ozie (A Mirror) | 500 Follower Special Bot

My previous bot: Velour (Desolate Wish Weaver)
